title: SearchWinCenterY Property
description: Sets and returns the Y coordinate value on the center of the search window.
notes:
Sets and returns the Y coordinate value on the center of the search window. Setting values are automatically updated when the search window is removed or resized by GUI.

See Also: SearchWinCenterY Property
